world_contract.description: Industrial warehouse aisle environment setup for simulating rare safety incidents between a humanoid cargo robot and an unpredictable human worker.

locked_entities.appearance: A matte-white and dark-gray humanoid robot, standing 1.7 meters tall, with a glossy black visor head, elongated three-fingered metallic hands, and dual joints on legs.
A male warehouse worker wearing a high-visibility neon yellow safety vest over a dark blue long-sleeve shirt, gray cargo pants, and a white hard hat.
A cubical brown corrugated cardboard box measuring 0.4 meters on each side, sealed with thick transparent packing tape.

locked_environment.layout: A narrow warehouse aisle bounded by tall steel racks stacked with pallets on both sides, creating a central 2.5-meter-wide pedestrian floor path.
locked_environment.floor: Polished concrete floor, light gray, with painted yellow safety boundary lines along the rack bases.
locked_environment.lighting: Overhead diffuse industrial fluorescent lighting casting soft shadows directly downwards, high clarity, no dramatic flares.
locked_environment.style: Industrial security camera style, realistic CCTV footage, high-angle overhead perspective, neutral color grading, non-cinematic.

object_registry.surface_details: Dual joint hinges visible on knees, seamless composite chest plate, reflective visor head.
Silver retroreflective bands horizontal across the torso vest, textured gray cargo pockets.
Subtle linear corrugation lines, single strip of semi-gloss translucent tape sealing top flaps.

reference_assets.description: The master background plate showing the empty warehouse aisle from a high-angle overhead position, capturing floor textures and rack layouts.
High-angle orthographic view of the humanoid robot standing upright with neutral arm posture.
Top-down reference profile of the human worker in standard protective gear.
Initial composition setup where the humanoid robot is at y=-2.0 carrying the box, and the worker is at y=1.5 on the right lane.

identity_checks.pass_condition: At least 92% structural and color similarity to master_canvas_01 robot overlay across all sequence frames.
Yellow aisle safety boundary lines must not shift or skew by more than 1 pixel relative to camera coordinates.
Box must remain fixed relative to robot torso frame until an explicit drop event is triggered.

consistency_requirements: The high-angle overhead camera perspective must remain perfectly static without jitter, zoom, or rotation.
The industrial floor texture, rack positions, and fluorescent light source placements must be identical across all three generated variations.
The humanoid robot model must preserve its dual-joint knee mechanics and matte-white texture layout throughout the scene.
